summary: Provision a brand-new Athena workgroup to isolate a team's queries, cost, and results location. No curated Athena estate exists yet, so this is a first stand-up an engineer reviews before it applies.

operations.title: Provision a new Athena workgroup
operations.summary: Request a brand-new Athena workgroup with its own results location and cost guardrail; an engineer reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a workgroup as a complete specification: state, enforced settings, cost controls, and where query results land in S3. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: workgroup_name
params.label: Workgroup name
params.help: Names the workgroup queries select in the console or the JDBC/ODBC driver.

params.name: state
params.label: State
params.help: DISABLED stops the workgroup from running any query until it is turned on.

params.name: output_location
params.label: Query results location (S3)
params.help: S3 URI where every query's results land, e.g. s3://my-bucket/athena-results/.

params.name: enforce_workgroup_configuration
params.label: Enforce workgroup settings
params.help: When on, every query in this workgroup uses these settings — a client cannot override the results location or cost cutoff.

params.name: bytes_scanned_cutoff_per_query
params.label: Per-query data-scan cutoff (bytes)
params.help: Cancels a query once it would scan more than this many bytes. Leave blank for no cutoff. Minimum 10 MiB (AWS floor).

params.name: publish_cloudwatch_metrics_enabled
params.label: Publish CloudWatch metrics
params.help: Publishes per-query metrics (data scanned, execution time) to CloudWatch.

params.name: requester_pays_enabled
params.label: Requester pays
params.help: Turn on only when this workgroup queries requester-pays S3 buckets outside this account.

params.name: force_destroy
params.label: Allow delete while queries exist
params.help: When off (default), the workgroup cannot be deleted while it still holds saved queries.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Workgroup name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this workgroup is for
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this workgroup.

decisions: Query-results encryption configuration (SSE-KMS) is an engineer decision
Engine version pinning and Spark/notebook workgroup configuration are engineer decisions
Identity Center and S3 access-grants integration are engineer follow-ups after creation
